ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Dec-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Robin Klomparens to appear on December 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the report of status of administration has not been filed. The Executor has resigned based on the premise that the assets of the Estate are being distributed under the probate action in Hong Kong but the resignation is not sufficient to either close the estate or discharge the Executor.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Harris.
